spec.reasoning: Three safe anchor types are used: (1) Lexical — 'Tags' is renamed to 'Labels' and 'Collection' to 'CollectionName'. Neither column name appears as a common English word in the instruction body; the instruction references 'Collection-' as a tag pattern within data, not as a column header, and 'Tags' does not appear in the instruction. The sheet is also renamed from 'Sheet1' to 'DataSheet'. (2) Positional title row insert — a title row is inserted at row 1, pushing headers to row 2 and data to rows 3-8. This shifts the answer position from B2:B7 to B3:B8, testing whether the model can handle non-row-1 headers. (3) Distractor column — a 'Category' column is added after the last column, which is plausibly related to tags/collections but clearly different. No data values need renaming since the column names don't appear as data values.
